source.business_scenario: 删 stats 后 film_actor 误选 NL
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
DELETE STATISTICS film_actor;
SELECT f.title, a.last_name
FROM film f, film_actor fa, actor a
WHERE f.film_id = fa.film_id AND fa.actor_id = a.actor_id
LIMIT 50
